title: 8 Signs a Godly Man Can Actually Take Correction
caption:
Most men can fake taking correction well for about ten seconds. Then the but shows up.

A man who actually walks humbly says thank you before he says but. He doesn't punish the person later for saying the hard thing now. He can hear it from someone younger than him, and he lets the same brother say it again next month, because taking it well once isn't the same as staying open to it.

Proverbs 15:31 puts it plainly: whoever heeds life-giving correction will be at home among the wise.

The real test isn't your face while he's talking. It's what you change after.

#faith #humility #christianman #godlyman #discipleship #character
